description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, surrounded by landscaped greenery including trees and hedges. The exterior is predominantly white with large, grid-style windows on the front and rear facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front yard is enclosed by a low hedge and includes a small tree, while the rear yard is more open with patio furniture and additional greenery. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially open to the exterior, suggesting a rooftop terrace or open-plan living space. The side views reveal symmetrical window placement and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The overall structure is compact, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and a streamlined, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large grid windows, flat roof, and landscaped front and rear yards featuring trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large grid windows, and a landscaped yard with a tree and hedge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, symmetrical windows, and trees on both sides of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patio area with lounge chairs, large windows, and a tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and visible landscaping, emphasizing the house's rectangular shape.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flanked by large grid windows and a landscaped front yard with a hedge and tree.
